title: Charge case outside screen/third screen, left zoom in/out
scenario: Charge case outside screen: tapping the left circle button zooms in to show new text, and tapping again zooms out to the original view
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
3. Locate the charge case outside screen (third screen) on the device UI.
4. Tap the left circle button on the charge case outside screen.
5. Observe the screen for zoom-in behavior and any new text that appears.
6. Tap the left circle button again.
7. Observe the screen for zoom-out behavior returning to the original charge case outside screen.
expected: Tapping the left circle button zooms in, showing new text. Tapping the left circle button again zooms out, returning to the original charge case outside screen.
